calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-09-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-09-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Lisa K. Padilla, Esq. appeared for plaintiff LEM/RAY Properties I DE, LLC.
Eric Wei, Property Accountant for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Linda Rosendo.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on May 22, 2008.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---Rental Agreement, dated 09/01/04-----------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Three-Day Notice to Pay Rent of Quit, dated 03/25/08---------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3---Certificate of Service of Three-Day
Notice to Pay Rent or Quit, dated 03/26/08-------------------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff LEM/RAY Properties I DE, LLC, and against defendant LINDA ROSENDO as follows:

Plaintiff LEM/RAY Properties I DE, LLC shall recover from defendant LINDA ROSENDO Rent/Per Diem Damages in the sum of $4,642.33, and Costs in the amount of $195.00, for a Total Judgment in the amount of $4,837.33.

Plaintiff LEM/RAY Properties I DE, LLC is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 81 Ninth Street, San Francisco, CA 94103. The lease is forfeited.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-05-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday, Jun-05-2008: Lisa Padilla, counsel for plaintiff Lem/Ray Properties I De, LLC; Josh Pebet, representative, appearing on behalf of plaintiff

Settlement Conference is off calendar; defendant Linda Rosendo is not present. June 09, 2008 trial date remains.

Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk L. Fong, not reported (218)
